ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category (e.g., Handheld, Television, Automotive) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type classification for the category (e.g., Handheld, Display, Sensor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Touchscreen, Microphone) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type classification for the feature (e.g., Input, Display, Sensor) */,
  "feature_status" TEXT /* Current status of the feature (e.g., Active, Inactive, Deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "section_title" TEXT /* Title of the section (e.g., Non-touch Navigation, Microphone) */,
  "section_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the section */,
  "section_type" TEXT /* Type classification for the section (e.g., Input, Display, Sensor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compatibility" (
  "compatibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compatibility entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section that describes the feature */,
  "requirement_level" TEXT /* Level of requirement (MUST, SHOULD, NONE) */,
  "compatibility_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the compatibility entry */,
  "compatibility_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks for the compatibility entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compatibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compatibility_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compatibility_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compatibility_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device (e.g., Smartphone, Smart TV) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the device belongs to */,
  "device_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type classification for the device (e.g., Phone, TV, Car) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model number or name of the device */,
  "device_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_features" (
  "device_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device-feature assignment */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "feature_status" TEXT /* Status of the feature on the device (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "feature_version" TEXT /* Version of the feature on the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_features_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_features_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the feature */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, product manager) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., R&D, Product Management) */,
  "user_contact" TEXT /* Contact information (e.g., phone number, office location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  "log_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "log_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature for which the requirement applies */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., Functional, Non-functional) */,
  "requirement_status" TEXT /* Status of the requirement (e.g., Draft, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirements_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_sections" (
  "feature_section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature-section association */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_sections_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_sections_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Feature Update, Requirement Change) */,
  "notification_url" TEXT /* URL to the relevant feature or requirement page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
